tasks.instruction: Match each description (A-L) to the correct country. Three descriptions do not match any country.

options.text: People in this country eat fish and chips as a traditional meal
The Statue of Liberty is a famous landmark in this country
Kangaroos and koalas live in the wild in this country
London is the capital city of this country
Baseball is one of the most popular sports in this country
Sydney and Melbourne are the two largest cities in this country
The Queen's Guard soldiers wear tall black hats in this country
Thanksgiving is a holiday celebrated in November in this country
The Great Barrier Reef is found near the coast of this country
Croissants are a popular breakfast food in this country
Cherry blossom festivals are a tradition in this country
The Sahara Desert covers a large part of this country
